title: Source Authenticity Hierarchy

hierarchy.description: Classical Panchanga and Jyotisha basis used to define concepts and canonical ontology.
allowed_source_types: Surya Siddhanta and Siddhanta tradition references
traditional muhurta and vrata/festival calculation references
regional Panchang/Panchangam source traditions with clear provenance
hierarchy.usage: Define canonical fields, source vocabulary and calculation awareness.

hierarchy.description: Regionally accepted living Panchang traditions and festival decision practices.
allowed_source_types: temple/trust/cultural-institution Panchang outputs with source details
hierarchy.usage: Record regional rule profiles without forcing one region's practice onto all users.

hierarchy.description: Modern research papers, astronomy-calendar studies and comparative Panchang analysis.
hierarchy.usage: Support methodology notes, corrections, differences and caution flags.

hierarchy.description: Scholars, authors and teachers whose style supports Sanskrit accuracy and cultural explanation.
hierarchy.usage: Guide wording discipline, not calculation claims unless specifically verified.

hierarchy.description: Drishvara's own reflective interpretation and editorial guidance layer.
hierarchy.usage: Generate reflective guidance only after source, calculation and regional-profile layers are established.

prohibited_source_usage: Do not use viral astrology posts as canonical source.
Do not claim a Panchang method from a living scholar without specific verified source.
Do not mix regional festival rules without recording the region/profile.
Do not present reflective guidance as deterministic prediction.
Do not create database seed records without source and review status.
